reasoning_content:
We need to fix the redefinition error. The log shows "redefinition of 'class ge::op::Ca6k04593Custom'" in op_proto.h:15 and earlier "DuplicateSectionError" in ops-info.ini. The root cause is that the host_operator_src contains both a manual OpDef class with OP_ADD(Ca6k04593Custom) AND the autogen also generates a REG_OP(Ca6k04593Custom) because project_json_src defines the op. The fix is to remove the manual OpDef class and OP_ADD from host_operator_src, and instead provide only the tiling function and inference functions. The autogen will generate the OpDef from the JSON. Also need to ensure the tiling header name matches the operator name exactly (ca6k04593_custom_tiling.h vs ca6k_04593_custom_tiling.h). The error also shows DuplicateSectionError due to duplicate section in ini file because the operator is registered twice. So we must have only one registration.

The repair memories suggest: do not include both REG_OP and OpDef registration; remove one. Since the autogen generates REG_OP from project_json_src, we should remove the manual OpDef class and OP_ADD from host_operator_src. Also need to adjust tiling include: use the correct generated tiling header name. Typically the tiling header is named after the operator name with "_tiling.h". The operator name in project_json_src is "Ca6k04593Custom". The autogen will generate files like "ca6k04593_custom_tiling.h". So include that. Also ensure the tiling data struct name matches.

Also note: the previous kernel_src uses ca6k_04593_custom as kernel name. That's fine. But the host_operator_src includes "ca6k_04593_custom_tiling.h" but the tiling header is generated based on operator name "Ca6k04593Custom", which should become "ca6k04593_custom_tiling.h". Need to fix include.

Also the python_bind_src: EXEC_NPU_CMD with aclnnCa6k04593Custom. That's fine.

Now produce the fix: Remove the manual OpDef class and OP_ADD from host_operator_src. Keep only tiling, infer shape, infer data type functions. Also fix tiling header include to match generated name.

Also ensure in project_json_src, the "op" field is exactly "Ca6k04593Custom". That's fine.

Now produce the six strings.
